source: auto: dsse-receipts.yml high-water mark on publish
note: Auto-maintained high-water mark of published *.dsse.json receipts on the governance-receipts ledger branch. Raised by .github/workflows/dsse-receipts.yml after each successful publish; never lowered (the ledger is append-only). The static floor in main's .github/rekor-recheck-baseline.json (issue #320) is the manual minimum; rekor-recheck.yml enforces the larger of the two.
